# ExKnowledge

> Practical explosion protection reference for engineers. ATEX, IECEx, zone classification, gas groups, temperature classes, protection methods, certification.

ExKnowledge covers the technical fundamentals of explosion protection (Ex) for hazardous areas. Written for engineers, technical sales, and anyone working with certified equipment in explosive atmospheres.

## Topics

- [Fundamentals](https://exknowledge.com/pages/fundamentals.html): Fire triangle, explosive atmospheres, LEL/UEL, 13 ignition sources, three protection principles
- [Zone Classification](https://exknowledge.com/pages/zone-classification.html): Zones 0/1/2 (gas), Zones 20/21/22 (dust), IEC 60079-10 methodology
- [Gas Groups](https://exknowledge.com/pages/gas-groups.html): IIA/IIB/IIC, MESG, MIC ratio, dust groups IIIA/IIIB/IIIC, NEC equivalents
- [Temperature Classes](https://exknowledge.com/pages/temperature-classes.html): T1-T6, auto-ignition temperatures, dust layer ignition
- [Protection Methods](https://exknowledge.com/pages/protection-methods.html): Ex d, Ex e, Ex i, Ex p, Ex n, Ex m, Ex o, Ex q, Ex t, Ex Op with zone suitability matrix
- [Equipment Protection Levels](https://exknowledge.com/pages/epl.html): Ga/Gb/Gc, Da/Db/Dc, ATEX category mapping
- [Ex Markings](https://exknowledge.com/pages/ex-markings.html): How to read ATEX/IECEx equipment labels, 5 real examples
- [Standards](https://exknowledge.com/pages/standards.html): IEC 60079 series, ATEX 2014/34/EU, 1999/92/EC, NEC 500/505, regional standards
- [Certification](https://exknowledge.com/pages/certification.html): Notified Bodies, IECEx scheme, ExTR, quality systems, CompEx
- [Installation & Inspection](https://exknowledge.com/pages/installation-inspection.html): IEC 60079-14, 60079-17, cable glands, inspection grades, common errors
- [Cheat Sheet](https://exknowledge.com/pages/cheat-sheet.html): Quick qualification questions, zone-EPL mapping, decision tree, cost/timeline
- [FAQ](https://exknowledge.com/pages/faq.html): Frequently asked questions about ATEX, IECEx, zone classification, Ex markings, certification

## In-Depth Guides

- [ATEX vs IECEx](https://exknowledge.com/pages/atex-vs-iecex.html): Geographic scope, legal basis, marking differences, mutual recognition
- [Explosion Proof vs Intrinsically Safe](https://exknowledge.com/pages/explosion-proof-vs-intrinsically-safe.html): Ex d vs Ex i comparison — cost, size, maintenance, zone suitability
- [How to Read an ATEX Nameplate](https://exknowledge.com/pages/how-to-read-atex-nameplate.html): 6 annotated real-world examples, complete decoding methodology
- [ATEX Directive 2014/34/EU](https://exknowledge.com/pages/atex-directive.html): Regulatory guide, conformity assessment modules, manufacturer obligations
- [Hazardous Area Classification](https://exknowledge.com/pages/hazardous-area-classification.html): IEC 60079-10 methodology, source of release, ventilation assessment
- [Dust Explosion Protection](https://exknowledge.com/pages/dust-explosion-protection.html): Zone 20/21/22, dust characteristics, Kst values, case studies
- [ATEX for Beginners](https://exknowledge.com/pages/atex-for-beginners.html): Plain-language introduction to explosion protection concepts
- [CompEx Certification Guide](https://exknowledge.com/pages/compex-certification.html): Training units, exam structure, career benefits, renewal
- [Hydrogen Explosion Protection](https://exknowledge.com/pages/hydrogen-explosion-protection.html): IIC challenges, TPRD venting, electrolysis facilities, infrastructure scaling
- [Cable Glands for Hazardous Areas](https://exknowledge.com/pages/cable-glands-hazardous-areas.html): Barrier vs non-barrier, flameproof, selection criteria, installation
- [Ex Equipment Selection Guide](https://exknowledge.com/pages/ex-equipment-selection-guide.html): Step-by-step methodology from zone classification to procurement

## Tools

- [Ex Certificate Scanner](https://exknowledge.com/exscanner/): Upload ATEX/IECEx certificate PDFs — extracts equipment marking, gas group, temperature class, protection type. 100% client-side, privacy-first.
- [Multilingual Ex Glossary](https://exknowledge.com/glossary/): 77 official Ex/ATEX/IECEx terms translated across 19 languages. Sourced from IEC 60079, national standards bodies, and IECEx member institutes. Search, compare, and download.

## Blog

- [Gas Group IIC Deep Dive](https://exknowledge.com/blog/gas-group-iic-hydrogen-acetylene.html): Why hydrogen, acetylene, and carbon disulfide demand IIC-rated equipment. MESG, MIC ratios, IIB+H₂ compromise.
- [March 2026](https://exknowledge.com/blog/2026-03.html): Iran conflict oil price impact, IECEx updates, Zone 2 device trends
- [February 2026](https://exknowledge.com/blog/2026-02.html): Hydrogen incidents, US regulatory rollback, R. Stahl restructuring
- [January 2026](https://exknowledge.com/blog/2026-01.html): R. Stahl 150 years, hydrogen ATEX gaps, chemical sector outlook
- [December 2025](https://exknowledge.com/blog/2025-12.html): BARTEC acquisition, SPS 2025, market growth
- [November 2025](https://exknowledge.com/blog/2025-11.html): Ex robotics, dust hazards, UK standards update

## Languages

Available in: [English](https://exknowledge.com/), [Deutsch](https://exknowledge.com/de/), [Norsk](https://exknowledge.com/no/), [Dansk](https://exknowledge.com/da/), [Svenska](https://exknowledge.com/sv/), [Suomi](https://exknowledge.com/fi/), [Español](https://exknowledge.com/es/), [Nederlands](https://exknowledge.com/nl/), [Português](https://exknowledge.com/pt/), [Italiano](https://exknowledge.com/it/), [العربية](https://exknowledge.com/ar/)

## Glossary Terms (77 terms, 19 languages)

The full multilingual glossary covers official Ex terminology in: English, Norwegian, German, French, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese, Dutch, Danish, Finnish, Swedish, Polish, Czech, Russian, Japanese, Chinese, Korean, Turkish, Arabic.

Key terms include: ambient temperature, area classification, ATEX certification, auto-ignition temperature, cable gland, category (ATEX), CE marking, certification body, clearances and creepage distances, competent person, conformity assessment, dust explosion, dust ignition-proof, encapsulation (Ex m), EPL (Equipment Protection Level), equipment group, Ex marking, explosion group, explosion proof (Ex d), explosive atmosphere, flame arrester, flameproof enclosure, gas detector, gas group, Group I, Group II, Group III, hazardous area, IEC 60079, IECEx, ignition source, increased safety (Ex e), inspection, installation, instrinsic safety (Ex i), IP rating, maximum surface temperature, MESG, minimum ignition current, minimum ignition energy, non-incendive (Ex n), notified body, oil immersion (Ex o), operating temperature, permit to work, powder filling (Ex q), pressurization (Ex p), protection concept, protection level, quality system, safe area, special protection (Ex s), T-rating, temperature class, type of protection, zone 0, zone 1, zone 2, zone 20, zone 21, zone 22.

## Site Technical Details

- Static site hosted on GitHub Pages
- 299 pages across 11 languages
- Schema.org structured data (Article, BlogPosting, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage)
- All content based on IEC 60079, ATEX 2014/34/EU, IECEx standards
- Not a substitute for official standards documents or professional engineering advice
